lines.en_lit: At the time of removal you shall burn the incense, As, if you do not say so afternoon which it is written: “And when Aaron lights the lamps in the afternoon he shall burn it” this too, initially lights the lamps and then burns the afternoon incense? And if you say indeed, so, wasn’t taught from evening until morning

Give its measure it will continue to burn all night from evening until morning. Alternatively, From evening to morning, you have only this service that is valid from evening to morning Rather, what is the Merciful One saying at the time of lighting you shall burn the incense, here too, at the time of removal you shall burn the incense,
And Abba Shaul said to you It is different there, as it is written: it oto
Rav Pappa said not difficult, This the Rabbis; that Abba Shaul. which is the mishna here established? in accordance with the Rabbis. lottery Abba Shaul.

Say the latter clause They brought him the the daily offering that he slaughtered And different completed slaughter on his behalf. he entered to burn the incense and to remove the lamps we have arrived at the Rabbis first clause and last clause the Rabbis, middle clause Abba Shaul. Rav Pappa said to you: Indeed, first clause and last clause the Rabbis, middle clause Abba Shaul.

Granted, Abaye does not say in accordance with Rav Pappa, not establish first clause and last clause the Rabbis middle clause Abba Shaul. However, Rav Pappa, what is the reason he did not say Abaye said to you in the first clause taught removal two lamps, and then removal five lamps,
And Abaye said to you a general directive And the sequence, the then teaches

the matter itself: comes to the northeast corner sprinkles northeast southwest corner sprinkles southwest And it was taught concerning Rabbi Shimon Ish HaMitzpa changes the daily offering northeast sprinkles northeast southwest he sprinkles west and then sprinkles south What is the rationale Rabbi Shimon Ish HaMitzpa,

Rabbi Yoḥanan said in the name of one of the school of Rabbi Yannai the verse states: “And one goat as a sin-offering to the Lord; it shall be offered aside from the daily burnt-offering and its libation” a burnt-offering the Merciful One said: Perform with it the procedure of a sin-offering.

how this sprinkles one that is two, in accordance with the procedure of a burnt-offering. he sprinkles two that are two, in accordance with the procedure of a sin-offering. And let him sprinkle two that are four in accordance with the procedure of a burnt-offering, and four that are four in accordance with the procedure of a sin-offering.

We did not find blood that atones and again atones. And did we find blood half of which a sin-offering and half of which a burnt-offering? Rather, perforce, the verse juxtaposes them Here too, perforce, the verse juxtaposes them

There, it is merely dividing the sprinklings. And Let us sprinkle one that is two below in accordance with the procedure of a burnt-offering, two sprinklings that are two above in accordance with the procedure of a sin-offering
We did not find blood half of which above and half of which below And no Didn’t we learn and sprinkled from one upward and seven downward?
like a matzlif; What like a matzlif? Rav Yehuda demonstrated like one who whips.
And no Didn’t we learn He sprinkled seven times from on tohoro of the altar. What, is it not middle of the altar, as people say: Clear noon [tihara], is the middle of the day?
